title: South Korea’s Starbucks Shut Early After ‘Tank Day’ Promotion Debacle
summary_full: All Starbucks stores in South Korea shut early on Monday because of a franchise-wide training instituted in the wake of a disastrous marketing campaign.
summary_public: All Starbucks stores in South Korea shut early on Monday because of a franchise-wide training instituted in the wake of a disastrous marketing campaign.
